manifest.author: jmerryman-eng
manifest.description: Eisenhower-matrix view for #task lines across your vault. Drag tasks between Do / Schedule / Delegate / Delete quadrants; status changes write back to the source markdown.
manifest.name: TaskMatrix

name: TaskMatrix

releases.author: jmerryman-eng
releases.description:
First release of TaskMatrix — an Eisenhower-matrix view for #task lines across your Obsidian vault.

- Drag tasks between Do / Schedule / Delegate / Delete quadrants and a backlog; placement is a #tm/qN tag written back to the source markdown.
- Cycle status (writes the checkbox char), inline double-click edit, per-card archive/delete (backlog + Delete quadrant), batch archive of completed tasks, and add-task to a backlog note.
- Detection mode (tagged #task vs. all checkbox lines) and backlog-note path are configurable.
- Atomic, conflict-checked writes; markdown is the only state. Theme-aware; mobile-compatible (isDesktopOnly: false).

Manual install: copy main.js, manifest.json, and styles.css into <vault>/.obsidian/plugins/task-matrix/ and enable the plugin.
